data.description: You can magically speak with all beasts within 30 feet of you for the duration. The creatures must be able to understand at least one language that you know, and they are aware that you're speaking with them.

You gain the ability to comprehend and communicate verbally with beasts for the duration. Casting Time: action; Range: touch; Components: V, S, M (a drop of bitumen); Duration: Concentration, up to 1 hour per level
Vines and undergrowth shift and close in, damaging creatures within reach.
